---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts/*/index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  page-size: 10
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

Browse posts by category using the sidebar, or search and filter below.

<!--
  FORMATTING RECOMMENDATIONS
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  • Quarto's built-in listing handles pagination (page-size),
    category filtering (categories: true), and sort/filter controls.
  • Each post lives in its own folder under blog/posts/<slug>/index.qmd.
    Add a thumbnail by including an image field in the post YAML.
  • For many posts, increase page-size or switch type to "grid" for
    a more visual layout.
-->
